ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each options contract */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the contract (e.g., Call, Put) */,
  "strike_price" TEXT /* Strike price of the contract */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset of the contract (e.g., stock, ETF, index) */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract (e.g., number of shares) */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the contract */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Time of expiration for the contract */,
  "call_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the call option */,
  "call_open_int" INTEGER /* Open interest in the call option */,
  "call_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the call option traded */,
  "call_last" TEXT /* Last traded price of the call option */,
  "last_traded_volume" INTEGER /* Last traded volume of the contract */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Total open interest in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Financial instrument being traded */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, ETF, index) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in price */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the instrument belongs */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Account balance of the user */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts made by the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_expired" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's password has expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of contracts traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., filled, partial, canceled) */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for canceling the trade (if applicable) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejecting the trade (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES options_contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options contract for which the alert is set */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification to be sent when the condition is met */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES options_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, market trend) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the report period */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being checked for compliance */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation that the trade must comply with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., regulatory, internal) */,
  "review_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the trade requires review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
